subject: [PATCH v2] mm/vmpressure: skip socket pressure for costly order reclaim

2026-04-03.patch_summary: This patch modifies the vmpressure() function to skip socket pressure when reclaiming at high order due to fragmentation. The function is made order-aware by adding an additional parameter sourced from scan_control, and socket pressure is only asserted when the order is less than or equal to PAGE_ALLOC_COSTLY_ORDER. This change prevents unnecessary throttling of TCP throughput when there is plenty of free memory. The patch also ensures that critical pressure from low reclaim priority is not suppressed by the order filter.
